---
title: '2014/01/21 Journal Tue'
date: '2014-01-21T16:14:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6864208258751063547'
blogger_filename: '/2014/01/20140121-journal-tue.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

&nbsp;1/21/2014 12:05 PM<br />
Journal Tue<br />
<br />
What's up...<br />
Taking Mom back to airport slowly by way of sight seeing and lunch. First she's mailing some things back to herself instead of hauling them on a plane.<br />
<br />
Going to take Connor to iHop for his last birthday hurrah before getting back to routine.<br />
<br />
Feeling. Tired of vacation. Ready to get a new job. Ready to start creating passive income. Feeling traction.<br />
<br />
Thanks for Mom who loves us even if she is a bit off sometimes. For Flavia who loves and encourages me.<br />
<br />
VOD: Romans 8:32 HCSB<br />
<br />
He did not even spare His own Son but offered Him up for us all; how will He not also with Him grant us everything?<br />
<br />
How is it that I still have so much doubt? On that note I've been really hard on Sean but I think it's what I see of me in him that I react to.
